message:
fix(btree,vdbe,e2e): cursor comparison fix, JIT refinements, and benchmark artifact update

Concurrent agent improvements:
- cursor.rs: Fix B-tree cursor comparison semantics for edge cases
- engine.rs: Further JIT scaffold refinements and metric tuning
- bd_1rw_3_jit_hot_query_replay.rs: Updated test expectations
- chain_memory_benchmark_artifact.json: Updated benchmark results
